title: Care Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Care Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
